stories.title: Into the spider’s lair: how an Australian film-maker made an impossible documentary with AI
stories.simple_summary: An Australian film-maker used AI tools to help make a documentary about spiders that would have been impossible to create otherwise.
stories.why_it_matters: This shows AI can help creative people do things they couldn't do before — but honestly, this is mostly interesting as a cool story rather than something that affects your daily life or business.

stories.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
stories.simple_summary: An AI program helped carry out a cyberattack (where criminals lock up your computer files and demand money), but a human still made all the important decisions and did the setup work.
stories.why_it_matters: This shows AI didn't actually do anything new yet — humans are still in charge of cyberattacks. Your regular computer security practices remain your best defense.

stories.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
stories.simple_summary: A company that makes computer memory chips is doing very well because AI needs lots of these chips, and now Americans will be able to invest in their company.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors — nothing you need to act on unless you have money in stock market investments.

stories.title: China's Alibaba bans Anthropic AI for employees after 'distillation attack' accusation
stories.simple_summary: China's Alibaba company banned its employees from using Anthropic's AI tool after accusing it of stealing their technology.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a business dispute between big companies and mostly matters to investors and tech workers — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Gov. JB Pritzker signs Illinois AI regulations into law, aiming to rein in 'the tech bros'
stories.simple_summary: Illinois passed a law to set rules for how AI can be used, trying to make sure tech companies don't cause harm.
stories.why_it_matters: If you live or work in Illinois, new laws will require AI systems to be more transparent and fair, which is good protection for you.

stories.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
stories.simple_summary: A tech company leader is discussing how to make AI work more efficiently by separating different parts of AI systems.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a technical business discussion that only matters to software engineers and investors — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Illinois Governor JB Pritzker signs AI bill into law
stories.simple_summary: Illinois passed a law to set rules for how AI can be used, trying to make sure tech companies don't cause harm.
stories.why_it_matters: If you live or work in Illinois, new laws will require AI systems to be more transparent and fair, which is good protection for you.

stories.title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
stories.simple_summary: Apple is updating Siri (its voice assistant) to sound more natural and let you adjust how fast it talks and how much emotion it shows.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use an iPhone and talk to Siri, the assistant should soon feel more like talking to a real person — a small improvement in convenience.

stories.title: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
stories.simple_summary: Big tech companies have laid off many workers this year, and they've said AI is one of the reasons.
stories.why_it_matters: If you work in tech, this shows companies are making changes because of AI, but for most small businesses this doesn't directly affect you.

stories.title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
stories.simple_summary: Google changed its privacy rules so it can now save more of your information — like your photos, files, and videos — to train its AI, but you can turn this off.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Google, you should know they're collecting more of your personal content, and you have the right to say no to this in your settings.

stories.title: Why A.I. Distillation Has Become a Hot Topic in the Race with China
stories.simple_summary: AI 'distillation' (where companies copy what one AI learned into a smaller, simpler AI) has become a big topic in competition between the US and China.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly a story about government and business strategy — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: I spy
stories.simple_summary: A writer watched a Netflix show and noticed it shows why smart glasses (glasses with cameras and AI) create a real problem: people won't trust them because they worry about being secretly filmed.
stories.why_it_matters: If smart glasses become popular, this shows an important problem — people need to see and trust how they work, which is just good sense.
